meaning: n.在Z形路轨向原来的方向返驶,改变角度adj.使用之字爬坡路线的
examples: The road started to turn in bends and switchback.
We have to switchback and persuade him out of his foolish plans.
Several hundred yards beyond the first switchback in the road, he came to the second bend.
First up is the switchback level, the red earth tracks zigzagging steeply through the clifftops.
The Dyna Switchback (a model with detachable bags and windshield) and V-Rod 10th Anniversary Edition are new for 2012.
